title: madhuca chiangmaiensis
intro: Madhuca chiangmaiensis, a plant species belonging to the Sapotaceae family, is native to Thailand and is also known as Chiang Mai butter tree or Chiang Mai sapote. The plant's bark and roots possess medicinal properties, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Madhuca chiangmaiensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
